phases.name: Architecture and Dependencies
phases.description: Set up project structure, install dependencies, and make architectural decisions about cache placement.

tasks.name: Install chokidar dependency
tasks.description: Add chokidar package to package.json for cross-platform file watching.

tasks.name: Decide IncrementalCache location
tasks.description: Choose whether to import IncrementalCache from pipeline/ or move to src/cache/. Document decision in analysis.json.
acceptance_criteria: If moving: src/cache/incremental-cache.ts created, pipeline imports updated
If importing: scanner imports from pipeline/ with comment explaining coupling

tasks.name: Create file-watcher module structure
tasks.description: Create src/scanner/file-watcher.ts with basic class structure and chokidar integration skeleton.
acceptance_criteria: FileWatcher class with constructor accepting project path

hard_stop.gate: Dependencies installed, cache location decided, file-watcher skeleton created

phases.name: Incremental Scanner Integration
phases.description: Integrate IncrementalCache into scanner.ts to enable cache-aware scanning.

tasks.name: Add cache parameter to scanCurrentElements()
tasks.description: Modify scanCurrentElements() to accept optional IncrementalCache parameter. Add logic to check cache before scanning files.
acceptance_criteria: Before scanning file, checks cache if enabled
Skips files that are unchanged (hash match)
Scans files that are new or modified
Falls back to full scan if cache disabled or missing

tasks.name: Update cache after scanning
tasks.description: After scanning files, update IncrementalCache with new hashes and metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Cache stores file hashes, mtime, size
Cache.save() called to persist to disk

tasks.name: Add --incremental flag to CLI
tasks.description: Add --incremental flag to src/cli/scan.ts to enable cache mode. Pass cache instance to scanner.
acceptance_criteria: Shows cache hit ratio in output

tasks.name: Test incremental scan performance
tasks.description: Run scan with --incremental on coderef-core project. Measure time for first run (cache miss) and second run (cache hit).
acceptance_criteria: Cache hit ratio >95% for unchanged project

hard_stop.gate: Incremental scan working with --incremental flag, cache hit ratio >95%

phases.name: File-Watcher Implementation
phases.description: Implement file-watcher with chokidar to enable real-time monitoring and incremental updates.

tasks.name: Implement file change event handlers
tasks.description: Add handlers for 'add', 'change', 'unlink' events in FileWatcher. Trigger incremental scans on changes.
acceptance_criteria: Each event triggers appropriate cache update and scan

tasks.name: Add --watch flag to CLI
tasks.description: Add --watch flag to src/cli/scan.ts to start file-watcher mode. Handle graceful shutdown on Ctrl+C.
acceptance_criteria: Shows real-time status updates in terminal
Handles SIGINT (Ctrl+C) to stop watcher cleanly

tasks.name: Add watch mode progress output
tasks.description: Add user-friendly output during watch mode showing file changes and scan results.
acceptance_criteria: Shows 'Watching for changes...' message on start
Shows 'File changed: X' on each event
Shows 'Scanning...' and 'Done in Xms' for each incremental scan

tasks.name: Test file-watcher end-to-end
tasks.description: Start --watch mode, modify files, verify incremental scans trigger and index updates correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Modify single file, see change detected
Delete file, verify removed from cache

hard_stop.gate: File-watcher working with --watch flag, real-time updates verified

phases.name: Testing and Documentation
phases.description: Add unit tests, integration tests, and update documentation.

tasks.name: Add unit tests for IncrementalCache integration
tasks.description: Create tests for scanner cache integration in src/scanner/__tests__/incremental-scan.test.ts

tasks.name: Update CLI help and README
tasks.description: Document --incremental and --watch flags in CLI help and project README.

tasks.name: Add JSDoc comments to new code
tasks.description: Add comprehensive JSDoc comments to file-watcher.ts and modified scanner functions.

phases.name: Close-out
phases.description: Commit changes, update improvements.json, and archive workorder.

tasks.name: Commit and push changes
tasks.description: Commit all changes with descriptive message and push to remote.
acceptance_criteria: git commit with clear message referencing IMP-CORE-057

tasks.name: Update improvements.json
tasks.description: Mark IMP-CORE-057 as done with close_reason and completion date.
acceptance_criteria: Files updated with all modified paths

tasks.name: Close workorder
tasks.description: Update communication.json with completion summary and close workorder.
acceptance_criteria: completion_summary added with commits and results

hard_stop.gate: All changes committed, improvements updated, workorder closed

functional: Second scan of unchanged project completes in <100ms (cache hit)
Modifying single file triggers re-scan of only that file
--watch mode continuously monitors and updates index
Cache hit ratio >95% for typical development workflow
performance: Incremental scan 100x faster than full scan on 1000+ file project
Memory overhead <50MB for cache of 10k files
File watcher CPU usage <1% when idle
test_coverage: Performance benchmark comparing full vs incremental scan
